details.test: Task 1: Create account and save Web Dev bookmarks into Learn Web Dev collection
Task 2: Organize tech articles into To Read This Week and Reference collections
Task 3: Save highest-rated qualifying bookmark into Security Tools collection
Task 4: Follow active data science curators
Task 5: Comment on a JavaScript-related bookmark
Task 6: Create public AI Ethics Starter Pack collection and copy its link
Task 7: Remove older duplicates keeping newest saved bookmark
Task 8: Make all Design Inspiration bookmarks private except first two
Task 9: Tag niche ML bookmarks with niche-ml and filter by tag
